nasb.text: “Be careful against an infection of leprosy, that you diligently observe and do according to all that the Levitical priests teach you; as I have commanded them, so you shall be careful to do.

esv.text: “Take care, in a case of leprous disease, to be very careful to do according to all that the Levitical priests shall direct you. As I commanded them, so you shall be careful to do.

cnv.text: “在大痲風的災病上，你要謹慎自己，照利未支派的祭司指教你們的一切，認真地謹守遵行；我怎樣吩咐了他們，你們就要怎樣謹守遵行。

ccb.text: “遇到麻风病，你们要谨遵利未祭司的指示。你们要谨遵我对他们的吩咐。
